changelog: Updated AP item ID mapping to match the current Dandara APWorld raw_items order.
Added Dandara Arrow Damage Upgrade, Dandara Weapon Damage Upgrade, and Salt's Awareness Upgrade tracking.
Added A Good Bargain (70 Chest) to tracker locations and AP autotracking mappings.
Updated Arrow of Freedom to track 6 copies and added counted tracking for Scarf of Freedom.
Added staged Settings icons for goal, ammo/mana cost, and shop cost from AP slot data.
Added Overworld NPC Check 3 mirror tracking from Temple of Creation (3 NPC).
Fixed locations.json trailing comma, a bad MusicianPowerOn image path, and missing images/items/1.png.
Added PopTracker update metadata through versions_url and versions.json.
